item.title: word_count
item.description: Vault Stats This vault currently contains 13,589 words across all notes.

item.title: Unlinked_Pages
item.description: Unlinked Notes Baseball choke Two grip choke on turtle Close guard overhook stiff Crusifix Straight ankle lock Grip break on upper back Cross collar grip break to takedown Collar grip break downward Double ankle grab pass Double under Toreando Leg drag S grip Lapel choke defence Side shimmy practice...

item.title: Empty_Pages
item.description: Empty Notes Canto choke Kimura Estima lock Gogoplata North south Hook Double leg Berimbolo The Truck Rubber guard .

item.title: Recently_Updated
item.description: Recently Updated Notes Gameplan README Formatting index Kimura & Americana Three sisters Buggy choke Bow and arrow Windshield wiper choke Papercutter .

item.title: Hip Bump
item.description: General Can lead to the sweep or alternatively to Triangle Steps Unbalance opponent to make them post hands on mat .

item.title: Guard pulling
item.description: General Very common way to disregard standing game entirely.

item.title: Gameplan
item.description: General Goal of this page is to outline a plan of what to do in different scenarios.

item.title: Elbow block
item.description: When being in a situation where your guard is being passed via a sudden sideways movement you should automatically put your elbow under the knee that is about to hit the floor.

item.title: Knee Shield
item.description: General defensive tool that means any situation where you have your elbow glued to the same sides knee.

item.title: Rekkamies
item.description: General Essentially a Lockdown for Berimbolo. No clue why it is called that.
